text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to give you some baked sweets for your
present. Do you have a request?

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Really? Then... a Superposition of cookie and
chocolate. That is always "Delicious."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Always? Are you talking about the cookies I leave
in the dorm cafeteria that everyone seems to
enjoy?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see... So you have been eating them too,
then?

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I check every day whether they are there.
However many I eat, I never become
Oversaturated.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea. Hehe, I was wondering why those
cookies seemed to disappear so quickly.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I must give my "I'm Sorry," correct? Since I ate
so many of them by myself...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm actually quite glad! It's a baker's pleasure
for her treats to be enjoyed so much.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll make you some extra special cookies as your
birthday present. You can have them all to
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
All myself! This Big Bang is incredible... It's like
a... "Dream."
